_comment: Brief release notes per agent version. The bot's release-announcement hook reads this when an agent version differs from the last one announced. Plain text, 2-4 short lines per version — the announcement is supposed to be a heads-up, not a full changelog. Unknown versions fall through to the generic 'is out' message.

2.4.18: Durable upload queue with retry — DNS / network blips don't drop encounters or chat anymore.
[U] update refuses to bounce mid-fight, mid-backfill, or with queued uploads (Shift+U overrides).
Peopleslayer LD counter wired up. New 🎉 Fun page on wolfpack.quest.
Per-character spell cast counter on the Info tab.
2.4.17: Healers tab marked BETA — exact heal amounts depend on the healer running the parser.
MAX-per-healer merge across multi-perspective uploads instead of SUM, defensive against future double-counting.
2.4.16: Opt-in backfill is fully silent on the dashboard now — old log replays don't move the live DEEPS / Tanks / Deaths counters.
Mob Procs panel removed pending a real design.
2.4.15: Skip flushing encounters where the highest-damaged target turned out to be a guild player (damage shield / charm quirks). PvP kills still surface via the broadcast flow.
2.4.14: Top-damage panel drops the 20K / 32K flat-execute attacks (Assassinate, Decapitate, Finishing Blow, Headshot) — they were dominating the panel without reflecting sustained DPS.
Threat list filters NPCs even when the boss has a single-word name (Vulak`Aerr, Doomshade, etc.).
2.4.13: Reset dashboard button in the header — wipes session counters and Recent Parses, preserves lifetime totals + opt-in backfill progress.
Backfill encounters no longer pollute the live agent dashboard.
2.4.12: Parse bare PvP-channel kill lines (no Druzzil Ro wrapper) — PvP-server kills land in the Discord PVP channel correctly now.
2.4.11: Opt-in backfill is silent on the dashboard.
Bot upload includes a backfill=true tag so old fights don't post Discord cards or stomp board timers.
2.4.10: Opt-in checkboxes work for every file (including those being live-tailed) — server-side dedup catches any overlap.
2.4.9: [W] hotkey opens wolfpack.quest from the dashboard or CLI.
